subject: [LSF/MM/BPF TOPIC] Towards Unified and Extensible Memory Reclaim (reclaim_ext)

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the complexity of the ops implementation and suggested splitting the code into a separate file to simplify maintenance.

reviews.author: Lorenzo Stoakes (Oracle)
reviews.summary: Expressed uncertainty about the need for ops and suggested deferring that decision until later.

2026-03-26.patch_summary: Proposal to split memory reclaim code into a separate file to simplify maintenance.
